title: Intensely Roasted Brazilian Chicken Roast
description: This halal-friendly Brazilian dish is a comforting and aromatic roasted chicken recipe featuring bitter notes and a hint of nutmeg, served on a traditional talavera plate.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, salt, black pepper, nutmeg, garlic powder, and paprika.
Place the chicken thighs in a large bowl and brush the oil mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and arrange the chicken thighs on it.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, reduce the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and brush with lemon juice.
Return the chicken to the oven and roast for a final 10 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
